file_name: PT Asian Bulk Logistics - Engage Marine - Questionnaire - May 2026_0.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if ABL or any of its subsidiaries (Transhipment Services Australia, One Rail Australia and SCF Containers) compete with Engage Marine or if one is a major supplier of services to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with ABL and/or Engage Marine.
